name: Amanda Fezile Soganile
name_meaning: Fezile is a Ndebele name meaning 'A wish that has come true'
bio: Hi, I'm Amanda — born in Bulawayo, currently on a mild adventure in Victoria Falls, which sounds more glamorous than it is but I'm committing to the story. I have a habit of making big life decisions and then acting surprised when they actually change my life. I'm equal parts curious and slightly chaotic (in a charming way, I'd argue), and I tend to treat life like something to explore rather than figure out all at once. Still a work in progress, but at least an entertaining one.
quirky_talent: I can find the nearest exit as quickly as possible and make myself scarce when someone is about to be sick
what_drives_me: I want to provide for my family and be happy with them and live out my best life. I don't want to just exist — I want to enjoy life to the fullest.
what_i_care_about: All about relentless improvement. My only competition is myself — I want to become the best version of myself.
mission: To build things that matter, keep learning relentlessly, and never just exist.
